name: Multi-Benefit Puppy Wet Food
description: Available exclusively from your veterinarian, Hill's Vet Essentials Multi-Benefit Puppy canned wet food for Small & Mini and Medium breed puppies with tender Chicken in a mouthwatering sauce provides advanced clinically proven multi-benefit nutrition. Help support your puppy's immunity with a unique antioxidant blend and healthy digestion and well-being with ActivBiome+ technology for your puppy's developing gut microbiome. With an irresistible flavour your puppy will love. For a better today - and many more tomorrows.
